mapper.select: -- 리스크 및 기회 평가 기준표 조회 SELECT 'riskAsmt' AS TITLE , '/RiskAndOpsAsmtCriteria' AS ROUTE , 'riskAsmtDesc' AS DESCRIPTION , CASE WHEN (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT(*) END FROM ESG.TB_RISK_AND_OPS_ASMT_CRITERIA WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId} AND CONFIRMED_YN = 'Y' AND CRITERIA_TYPE = 'R') + (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT(*) END FROM ESG.TB_RISK_AND_OPS_ASMT_CRITERIA WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId} AND CONFIRMED_YN = 'Y' AND CRITERIA_TYPE = 'O') >= 2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACTIVEYN UNION ALL -- 리스크와 기회 조회 SELECT 'riskOpp' AS TITLE, '/RisksAndOpportunitiesManage' AS ROUTE, 'riskOppDesc' AS DESCRIPTION, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ESG.TB_RISKS_AND_OPPORTUNITIES WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId} AND WRITE_YEAR = #{searchText}) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACTIVEYN;

SELECT comp_id, criteria_id, criteria_type, confirmed_yn, confirmed_dt, use_yn, created_at FROM esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY criteria_id DESC, use_yn = 'Y' DESC;

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(A.criteria_id) IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '0001' WHEN SUBSTRING(MAX(A.criteria_id) FROM 1 FOR 8)::DATE < CURRENT_DATE THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '0001' ELSE TO_CHAR(CAST(MAX(A.criteria_id) AS BIGINT) + 1, 'FM000000000000') END AS criteria_id FROM esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId}

SELECT A.comp_id, A.criteria_id, A.criteria_type, A.confirmed_yn, A.confirmed_dt, A.created_at, B.detail_type, B.detail_seq, B.content1, B.content2, B.content3, B.content4, B.ord_seq, B.use_yn AS detail_use_yn FROM esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria_detail B ON A.criteria_id = B.criteria_id WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.criteria_id = #{criteriaId} ORDER BY B.use_yn = 'Y' DESC, B.ord_seq
SELECT detail_type, content1, content2, content3, content4, ord_seq FROM dataset.tb_dataset_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria ( comp_id, criteria_id, criteria_type, confirmed_yn, confirmed_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{criteriaId}, #{criteriaType}, #{confirmedYn}, #{confirmedDt}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} ) ON CONFLICT (criteria_id) DO UPDATE SET comp_id = EXCLUDED.comp_id, criteria_type = EXCLUDED.criteria_type, confirmed_yn = EXCLUDED.confirmed_yn, confirmed_dt = EXCLUDED.confirmed_dt, use_yn = EXCLUDED.use_yn, created_at = now(), created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by

SELECT LPAD(CAST(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(detail_seq AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 AS INTEGER)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS detail_seq FROM esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria_detail WHERE criteria_id = #{criteriaId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria_detail ( criteria_id, detail_type, detail_seq, content1, content2, content3, content4, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{criteriaId}, #{detailType}, #{detailSeq}, #{content1}, #{content2}, #{content3}, #{content4}, #{ordSeq}::integer, #{detailUseYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria SET confirmed_yn = CASE WHEN #{confirmedYn} = 'N' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, confirmed_dt = CASE WHEN #{confirmedYn} = 'N' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE '' END, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE criteria_id = #{criteriaId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria_detail WHERE criteria_id = #{criteriaId} AND detail_type = 'RC'
